method: Superimpose designed binder onto each of the 3 receptor copies in the 6MGP 4-1BBL:4-1BB 3:3 assembly (Kabsch on shared receptor CA); score (1) heavy-atom clash vs the 4-1BBL trimer, (2) inter-copy binder-binder clash, (3) radial placement vs receptor centroid.
separation: >13000:0 ligand-clash — filter reproduces known agonism ranking

pass_criteria.interpretation: binder permits ligand trimerization AND does not sterically prevent neighboring-receptor recruitment into the cluster
